title: chrysocoma microphylla
intro: Chrysocoma microphylla, commonly known as Greenery or Wild Chamomile, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating a range of health issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Chrysocoma microphylla is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
